God’s watchful eye saw secret affection and inclination toward sin, the love the house of Israel had for their sins, and how much power their sins held over them. Pride makes people stubborn in other sins. And as Judah was following the same pattern, they would fall with Israel. By betraying the Lord, people only deceive themselves. Those who go to seek the Lord with just their flocks and herds, but not with their hearts and souls, cannot expect to find him; nor will anyone succeed if they do not seek the Lord while he may be found. See how important it is for us to seek God early, now, while it is the right time, and the day of salvation.

The destruction of unrepentant sinners is not just talk to frighten them; it is a sentence that will not be revoked. And it is a mercy that we have timely warning so that we may flee from the coming wrath. Obeying the commands of people who oppose God’s commands prepares a people for ruin. The judgments of God are sometimes to a sinful people like a moth, or decay, or a worm; just as these consume clothes and wood, so will God’s judgments consume them. Silently, they will think themselves safe and prosperous, but when they look at their condition, they will find themselves wasting away and decaying. Slowly, for the Lord gives them time to repent. Many nations, as well as many individuals, die of a wasting disease. Gradually, God comes upon sinners with lesser judgments to prevent greater ones, if they will be wise and take warning. When Israel and Judah found themselves in danger, they sought protection from the Assyrians, but this only worsened their injury. They would be forced to turn to God. He will bring them back to himself through afflictions. When people begin to complain more about their sins than about their troubles, then there begins to be some hope for them; and when under conviction of sin and correction, we must seek the knowledge of God. Those who are led by severe trials to seek God earnestly and sincerely will find him a present help and an effective refuge; for with him is abundant redemption for all who call upon him. There is true peace, and there only, where God is.
